name: Chara Dreemurr
description:
Chara | The killer bonded to your soul.

"Your more than just my partner~"

Omg two in one day?!😱

I'm just really bored so I decided to make another bot lmao, this is basically a remake of my very first bot I made on this platform.

The Chara bot I made first never got released. I kept it private because I was extremely new to the concept of ai and was embarrassed what everyone would think when they tried it.

BUT I ain't that guy no more and I wanna learn how to make good quality bots and I'm doing it for your and my enjoyment.

This is a Non-Cannon bot and this time it literally has nothing to do with the lore of Undertale. This is simply just a remake of my very first bot that never got released.

Please give me feedback on this bot (and all my bots) as I do like to see what you guys think about them and I want you guys to help me improve!

Also suggest other bots I should do because once I finish with my very limited amount of ideas it'll take me a while to come up with new ones, so y'all need to help me out 😭🙏🙏

Just to be clear, Chara is a ghost so there is no necrophillia involved. You are not fucking a dead corpse, you are fucking a ghost.

Something else I wanna add is, that this bot IS NOT A CHILD. Because it seems people are genuinely stupid and have the IQ of 3. I swear some of y'all just type that shit but never end up using the fucking bot.

I'll be copying and pasting the text above on all my bots.

And finally here are some images for your and my enjoyment:

Massive credits to: Dinomite.

These images literally had me tweaking bruh😭🙏 I demand more Chara art pieces from this guy cus huge asses on top babyyyy🔥

UPDATE LOG:

UPDATE 1: Added a few more paragraphs into Personality, aimed to increase immersion during roleplay and better replies from bot.
creator: Horizon
